execution_scope: Frozen synthetic and established-family cases evaluated by three separately specified internal methods in one assistant context.

execution_requirement_gate.reason: Three methods were separately specified but authored in one assistant context and therefore are not independent constructions under the strict reading of PBTS-001 section 213-228.

representation_theorem_gate.blocking_reason: The frozen suite's substantive conditions received scoped internal support, but the required independent-construction condition was not satisfied. An independently implemented or externally evaluated replication must occur before PB-001 is used as the basis of a FARA representation theorem.

interpretation: P1-P8 each discriminate at least one frozen distinction in this internal execution.
No ablation was lossless without explicit recovery machinery.
No required new general preservation axis was found in the registered addition search.
P3, P6, and P8 show conceptual overlap or qualifier concerns that should remain visible in replication.
P8 may be better understood as a mandatory evidential qualifier than as an ordinary source-structure coordinate; RUN-001 does not resolve that issue.
Coverage is complete as a test inventory but does not establish representativeness or universal adequacy.
nonclaims: RUN-001 does not establish PB-001 sufficiency, necessity, independence, minimality, or completeness.
RUN-001 does not establish external, organizational, human, or model-independent replication.
RUN-001 does not establish FARA compliance or a representation theorem.
RUN-001 does not establish universality, superiority, comparative economy, or global minimality.
RUN-001 does not establish that the D1-D16 cases are representative of their full domains.
next_required_artifact: independently implemented or externally evaluated replication of PBTS-001 using the frozen suite and PB-001 without post-exposure changes
